title: World Download Button
description: Tired of installing minecraft maps manually? This mod adds a button to the select world screen that allows you to instantly install worlds from your downloads folder.
body:
# World Download Button
Tired of installing minecraft maps manually? This fabric mod adds a button to the select world screen that allows you to instantly install minecraft worlds directly from your downloads folder!

### Cannot find a valid zip file?
Make sure you have a valid zip file of a minecraft world (containing a level.dat file) in your user's downloads directory (**C:\users\user\Downloads**, or **~/Downloads** on Linux)

If the level.dat file isn't directly inside the root of the archive, it will automatically extract it recursively!

![Gif of the mod being used to install a world ](https://i.gyazo.com/c6b6950d3dbe656e442bb01d639c7d97.gif)

(originally called EasyMapDownload)
